title: Multi-host PMM inventory unified in /databases list
candidateRelease: v0.5 or v0.6 — bumps the post-v0.4 roadmap
scopeNote: Bigger lift than v0.4.1 patch — touches inventory model, multi-source UI, PMM upstream auth.
openQuestions: Q1 — Inventory refresh cadence: 30s poll / 60s poll + manual refresh / PMM webhook?
Q2 — UI representation: unified table with Source column / stacked sections (managed-on-top) / tabs?
Q3 — Display schema for PMM-only services (host / port / agent-id / engine type from PMM metadata; no connection card)
Q4 — Detect + surface 'DinoPanel-managed row whose PMM service was deleted out-of-band'
Q5 — Forward compatibility: does this commit us to multi-host DinoPanel itself (control-plane → remote agents) in v0.6+?
blockedBy: Operator product decision: positioning DinoPanel as unified DB inventory view across managed + monitored — confirm direction before activating.
